name: Savory Chicken and Rice in a Lotus Leaf (China)
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole chicken breast, boned and skinned
2 tbsp Soy sauce, plus more for dipping
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a large Dried lotus leaf on a flat surface.
2. Arrange the long-grain rice, sweet glutinous rice, chicken stock, Chinese sausages (lop-cheong), black mushrooms, and dried shrimp in a single layer on the lotus leaf.
3. Add the boned and skinned chicken breast to the center of the ingredients.
4. Fold the sides of the lotus leaf over the ingredients, then roll tightly into a tight package.
5. In a pot, combine the remaining soy sauce, sugar, white pepper, and sesame oil for dipping sauce.
6. Bring the stock to a boil, then carefully place the sealed lotus leaf parcel into the boiling liquid.
7. Cover and simmer gently over low heat for about 45 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
8. Carefully remove the lotus leaf package from the pot, allowing excess steam to escape safely before unfolding it on a serving dish.
9. Serve hot with the prepared dipping sauce on the side.
